home.progressMotivate1: Keep going — you can do it!

habit.title: Health Assessment
habit.pageSubtitle: Upload a report image or fill in manually
habit.uploadSub: Upload a lab report image to fill values automatically
habit.uploadTip: Ensure all values are clearly visible. Crop out unrelated content for best accuracy.

analyze.title: Your Analysis
analyze.subTitle: Based on the health features you provided
analyze.chartCaption: Estimated diabetes risk based on your inputs
analyze.meansText: Your results indicate an elevated likelihood of health risks related to blood sugar and metabolism. This is not a diagnosis — it's a signal to take preventive action early.
analyze.disclaimer: Disclaimer: AI-generated assessment only. Not a medical diagnosis. Consult a healthcare professional.

plan.label: HEALTH PLAN
plan.title: Recommendations
plan.subTitle: Personalized plan based on your risk profile
plan.explanationText: Your risk level is high due to elevated glucose, insulin, and age — key indicators linked to diabetes and metabolic conditions. This is not a diagnosis, but early action can significantly reduce long-term risk.
plan.action1: Monitor blood sugar and blood pressure regularly.
plan.action2: Stay hydrated to support kidney and metabolic function.
plan.action3: Limit sedentary time and avoid alcohol or smoking.
plan.action4: Review trends monthly with a healthcare provider.
plan.life1: Diet: whole foods, reduced refined sugars.
plan.life2: Exercise: 30–60 min moderate activity, most days.
plan.medText: Consult a healthcare provider for HbA1c and lipid panel tests. A personalised medical plan reduces complications and improves long-term outcomes.
plan.medFooter: This is not a medical diagnosis. Always consult a qualified professional.

profile.label: ACCOUNT
profile.title: Profile
profile.savedNote: Plans are saved when you click Save Plan on the Health Plan page.
